name: Green Beans and Tomatoes with Basil
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds green beans, diagonal, 1 1/2 inches pieces
4 small tomatoes, peeled, cut into 1/8 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pressure cooker.
- Add garlic and stir for a few seconds.
- Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients.
- Mix thoroughly.
2. Close the lid of the pressure cooker.
- Bring to full pressure on high heat.
- Reduce the heat and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Turn off the heat source.
- Release any built-up pressure using the fingertip control.
- Open the pressure cooker carefully.
4. Serve hot.
